name: Beef Tips
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry red wine or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup flour with the salt and pepper and toss with beef cubes to coat thoroughly.
2. Place the coated beef in a crock-pot.
3. Add green onions and drained mushrooms to the crock-pot.
4. Pour beef broth, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato paste or ketchup over the beef and vegetables; stir well.
5. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 12 hours.
6. One hour before serving, turn to HIGH setting.
7. Make a smooth paste of red wine and 3 tablespoons flour.
8. Stir the paste into the crock-pot, mixing well.
9. Cook until thickened.
10. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
